{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/73113688?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/FORIMOC", "id": 73113688, "login": "FORIMOC", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjczMTEzNjg4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/FORIMOC", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44651", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "## Resolution

Fixed in SillyTavern 1.18.0: a user-provided URL is no longer reflected in the HTTP response body.

## Overview
- Vulnerability Type: XSS
- Affected Location: `src/middleware/corsProxy.js:40`
- Trigger Scenario: reflected XSS in CORS proxy error response

## Root Cause
When `fetch(url)` throws, the code sends:
`res.status(500).send('Error occurred while trying to proxy to: ' + url + ' ' + error)`.
The `url` value is attacker-controlled (`req.params.url`) and is not HTML-escaped before rendering.

## Source-to-Sink Chain
1. Source (user-controlled input)
- Entry point: `GET /proxy/:url(*)`

2. Data flow
- Code analysis shows concrete propagation into this sink:
  - vulnerability title: `Reflected XSS in CORS proxy error response`
  - sink location reached by attacker-controlled input: `src/middleware/corsProxy.js:40`
- The same sink behavior is confirmed by controlled execution observations.

3. Sink (dangerous operation)
- Sink location: `src/middleware/corsProxy.js:40`
- Vulnerable behavior: reflected XSS in CORS proxy error response

## Exploitation Preconditions
1. The attacker can inject controllable content into a rendered response.
2. The vulnerable rendering context does not apply strict output encoding/sanitization.
3. A victim user opens the affected page or response.

## Risk
This issue enables script execution in the victim context and can compromise session or data integrity.

## Impact
An attacker may run arbitrary JavaScript in the victim context, steal tokens, and manipulate user-visible behavior.

## Remediation
1. Never concatenate raw user input into HTML error responses.
2. If URL echo is required, HTML-escape it or force plain-text output.
3. Re-enable/strengthen CSP to reduce reflected injection impact.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00323, "percentile": 0.23878}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-12T22:23:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44651"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T19:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-05-12T22:23:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/security/advisories/GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9", "https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/releases/tag/1.18.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44651", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/SillyTavern/SillyTavern/security-advisories/GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/SillyTavern/SillyTavern", "summary": "SillyTavern has a reflected XSS vulnerability in the CORS proxy middleware", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:32:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xc4x-2452-5gc9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.18.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "sillytavern"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.17.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SillyTavern has a reflected XSS vulnerability in the CORS proxy middleware
